name: A Taste of First Love
overview: "A Taste of Fist Love" tells the story of the now bankrupt Sun Wei Yi, who has a complex relationship with the mechanic Bai Ze Liu. Five years later, Sun Wei Yi became a first-class beautician, while Bai Ze Liu also went upstream and became the president of e-commerce. The two met again due to business ties.

trailers.title: Trailer | The unlikely encounter | ENG SUB [A Taste of First Love]
